name: Schlotter, William
evidence: Filing lists occupation/employer as 'requested' (campaign never obtained them). At least three distinct William Schlotters surface in/near Austin — a Capitol Anesthesiology Association CEO (spelled 'Wiliam'), a Stronghold Ltd life-support manager, and a 'William Max Schlotter' in public-records aggregators — and nothing in the record ties any of them to zip 78750. Not disambiguated; no industry assigned.

name: Scott, Jeff
evidence: Self-reported employer Scott Sustainable Solutions is a real Austin firm founded 1997, run by Jeffrey Scott as its sole employee; LinkedIn classifies it under Real Estate and describes owner's-rep style work — project planning, risk evaluation, and 'decision frameworks' for lifecycle-conscious construction. Employer corroborated; the specific individual is not independently confirmed at zip 78737 beyond his own filing statement, and the Real Estate label rests on LinkedIn's industry field (Consulting is an arguable alternative).

name: Borth, Margaret
resolved_employer: Tate Property (Austin luxury real estate brokerage); now Coldwell Banker Realty
evidence: Margaret Murchison-Borth is an Austin real estate agent (TX license 494474), a fourth-generation Austinite and member of the Austin Board of Realtors, currently at Coldwell Banker Realty; her self-reported 2022 employer Tate Property is a real multi-generational luxury brokerage at 2630 Exposition Blvd. Self-reported occupation 'Real Estate' matches an identified Austin realtor of that uncommon name; home zip 78731 vs. brokerage office 78703 is a normal home/office split.

name: Kruger, David
evidence: David Kruger is the third-generation owner of Kruger's Diamond Jewelers at 722 Congress Ave, downtown Austin — a family store his father opened in 1939, where David has worked since roughly 1969 and his daughter Rachel is now the fourth generation. Self-reported 'Owner / Kruger's Jewelers' matches exactly; residential zip 78731 with the store in 78701.

name: Kath, Melissa
resolved_employer: Half King Partners LP (real estate investor)

Lipson are listed lead campaign donors to UT's Dell Medical School and supporters of Austin PBS and St. Andrew's School. Filing occupation was 'requested' (unknown to the campaign), and donor zip 78757 does not match her known 78746 Stratford Dr holdings — identification rests on the rarity of the name plus confirmed Austin residency, so medium not high.

name: Cunningham, Brock
evidence: Filer self-reported occupation 'student' with employer 'n/a', which directly supports the Student classification regardless of identity. The likeliest match is Brock Cunningham, the Austin-raised UT Longhorns basketball forward (St. Stephen's, then Westlake HS; son of former UT lineman Ed Cunningham), who was an enrolled UT student at the time of the Feb 2022 gift. Cautioned to medium: his published ties are to Westlake/78746 rather than Lakeway/78734, and a separate adult of the same name in the Lake Travis area cannot be ruled out.

name: Dargenio, Cassandra
evidence: Cassandra Bills Dargenio is tied by public-records aggregators to several Austin 78704 addresses and has worked as General Manager at Kimber Modern Boutique Hotel and as a house manager at Driftwood Recovery/Riverside Extended-care. Corroborating detail: one of her listed addresses, 110 The Cir, is the Kimber Modern's own street address (the property has since been rebranded Frame Hotel – Treehouse), and a 2022 Austin campaign finance report lists a Cassandra Dargenio at 206 E Elizabeth St, 78704 — matching the donor zip. Filing occupation was 'N/A'.

name: Erwin, Andrew
evidence: Self-reported employer Legacy MCS is a confirmed Austin-based full-service general contractor (7800 Shoal Creek Blvd) specializing in multi-family and build-to-rent construction, founded 2015 by the Brewer family with 700+ units delivered since 2019. Erwin is not among its named principals, so he is presumably a staff employee; an 'Andrew Erwin' LinkedIn profile in Austin sits at multifamily developer Trinsic Residential Group, consistent with the same multifamily-construction career but not confirmed as the same person. Occupation 'Construction' is self-reported.

name: Douglass Holly, Jordan

The individual's own profile could not be retrieved (LinkedIn blocks automated fetch), so the project-manager role rests on the filing's self-report; employer and geography corroborate, identity does not.

Occupation and employer are internally consistent and specific, but Erika Johnson is a common name and no Austin-based individual profile could be confirmed at zip 78731 — the industry rests on the filing's own employer string, not on identification of the person.
